reviews.text: Stephanie was an absolute dream to work with planning our destination wedding in Vail. Her network of vendors is extensive in the area which made planning with trusted partners much easier. Plus, they all love working with Stephanie and the energy and professionalism she brings to every event. Our wedding was absolutely magnificent, with several guests commenting it was one of the best they have ever attended. Stephanie's organization, commitment to detail and problem solving is definitely what made our day such a beautiful success. If you want someone who will understand, love and execute your vision to perfection, Stephanie is your girl.

Stephanie and her team are so incredible to work with. She made the entire process of planning a wedding as easy as it can be. From extremely quick communication to incredible ideas and listening to the input of the bride and groom, Stephanie and her team will take your dream wedding and make it a reality!
Stephanie did an amazing job for helping me give the best proposal that I could ever ask for. She planned it out very good and would highly recommend her.

Stephanie and Caroline were absolutely fabulous!! My wife and I got married in Copper Mountain this past January and they made our wedding a dream come true! They worked with us for well over a year planning our destination wedding and it turned out perfect! Delivering everything my wife asked for, even all the vendors they recommended were perfect. We highly recommend them to anyone looking for a 5 star wedding!

Stephanie was an absolutely incredible wedding planner, I can't say enough great things about her!! She was so professional,  efficient, organized, caring, and fun to work with! She made the wedding planning process SO much less stressful and we couldn't have pulled off our gorgeous wedding at Camp Hale without her! The first phone call I did with her before we even booked her services, I was very stressed out and she spent an hour and a half on the phone with me, going over all the planning details so far and detailing how she could help with the process. By the time I got off the phone just from that first call, I already felt so much better and less stressed. We booked her immediately and have absolutely no regrets about it!

We highly recommend her, especially if you're getting married at Camp Hale because she was one of the first planners to ever work with the venue and knows it and the staff very well. Camp Hale requires at least a day-off planner, but we hired Stephanie as a partial planner, she helped us beginning several months before with some of the vendors and aspects I felt we needed help with. She also recommended the photographers we ended up booking (Gillespie Photography), our cake/desserts baker (Cornerstone Chocolates) and they were both amazing as well! If it's in your budget to hire her as a full-service planner I highly recommend it, that's the only thing I would've changed about the experience of working with her! We loved her attention to detail and recommendations, and she brought a whole team with her the day-of and they were on top of everything. Stephanie is the best!
